EASL HCV Abstract Dashboard vNext

All 80 abstracts embedded directly; full abstract text extracted from the scored team-ranking workbook where available.

Executive Summary

This dashboard prioritizes abstracts using team score, AI strategic alignment, A votes, relevance group, and high-value themes such as Test & Treat, elimination, high-risk equity, pregnancy, and economic value.

Use the detail drawer to export an individual abstract detail page to PDF.
